rationale: Empirical lens, every gate green. Structure: all assertions hold — .mindspec/{specs,adr,domains,core} + context-map.md present; no .mindspec/docs, no root review/, no root docs/; project-docs/user present; glossary.md + policies.yml dropped; reviews co-located (099-final-panel under .mindspec/specs/099-*/reviews/). The move's hard gate — doctor.CheckMovedTreeLinks over the flat worktree root — returns ZERO dangling links (ran via a temp _test.go, then removed; worktree git status clean). go build ./... and go vet ./... clean. internal/workspace + internal/validate PASS. internal/layout: ONLY TestLayoutPackageIsOwned fails, on the hardcoded old fixture path ../../.mindspec/docs/domains/workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml (Bead-6 scope) — no other failure. AC19 grep empty. Zero .go files in the diff (no source corruption). Self-globs repointed to flat .mindspec/domains/<d>/OWNERSHIP.yaml. Content repairs sound: link fixes resolve to real targets (independently verified existence), only the 2 intentional vestigials carry net deletions; no renamed doc gutted. Lineage manifest 12 entries + skipped. Two cosmetic out-of-scope doc-prose staleness nits noted; neither blocks.

findings.issue: All structure assertions PASS: .mindspec/{specs,adr,domains,core}+context-map.md present; .mindspec/docs, root review/, root docs/ all absent; project-docs/user present; glossary.md+policies.yml dropped; reviews co-located (099-final-panel).

doctor.CheckMovedTreeLinks over the flat worktree root = 0 dangling links (the move's 404 gate is genuinely GREEN). Verified via temp _test.go calling the real function; temp file removed, git status clean.

go build ./... + go vet ./... clean; internal/workspace + internal/validate PASS; internal/layout has exactly one failure — TestLayoutPackageIsOwned on hardcoded old fixture path (Bead-6 scope), nothing else. harness intentionally not run.
Zero .go files in the commit diff (445 R / 4 M / 2 A / 2 D); AC19 grep for GLOSSARY.md|policies.yml in non-test internal/cmd .go source is empty. No source corruption.

Sampled the highest-content-change renames (user/AGENTS.md, README.md, root AGENTS.md, OWNERSHIP self-globs): relative paths corrected and pre-existing-broken links re-pointed to real, existence-verified targets with meaningful link text. numstat shows only the 2 dropped vestigials carry net deletions (>2) — no renamed doc lost meaningful content.

internal/instruct/templates/spec.md correctly drops the now-defunct 'Add glossary entries (GLOSSARY.md)' bullet, but sibling inline-code paths still read .mindspec/docs/{specs,domains,core,adr}. These are inline-code, not markdown links, so the 404 gate correctly does not flag them. Out of Bead-5 scope: plan.md+review.md (untouched) carry the same .mindspec/docs/ strings, and the 162 source matchers keep .mindspec/docs/ as the canonical-compat prefix by design. Consider a follow-up bead to migrate template path-strings. Non-blocking.

.mindspec/domains/core/architecture.md:56 still gives the example warning text 'Missing optional structure (e.g., `docs/domains/`, `docs/context-map.md`)' in backticks — stale prose example, not a link, not gated. Pre-existing doc-accuracy nit, outside the move's mandate. Non-blocking.
